message:
refactor(runtime): enhance region-based memory management

Improve the region allocator and reference counting primitives:

record/region.rs:
- Add region merge/split operations
- Improve allocation alignment
- Better deallocation tracking

runtime/region_heap.rs:
- Add heap introspection methods
- Better fragmentation handling

types/rref.rs:
- Improve RRef lifetime tracking
- Better Debug formatting

obligation/leak_check.rs:
- Minor cleanup

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
